content:
Phase 3.8 + 3.9 – Real payment backend (Tap test mode) + invoices system

You are working on Heavyar React Native (Expo) app with Cloudflare Workers backend.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Do NOT break existing request flow
- Do NOT refactor unrelated code
- Use current Firestore structure
- Use TAP_MODE = test
- NEVER expose secret keys in frontend or Firestore

==================================================
BACKEND (Cloudflare Worker)
==================================================

1. Create secure payment endpoint:

POST /api/create-payment

- Use TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST from environment
- Create real Tap charge request (test mode)
- Input:
  - amount
  - currency (SAR)
  - customer info
  - requestId

- Return:
  - payment URL or charge response

2. Create verification endpoint:

POST /api/verify-payment

- Validate payment status from Tap
- Return success/failure

==================================================
INVOICE SYSTEM (Firestore)
==================================================

Create collection: invoices

Fields:
- id
- invoiceNumber (format: INV-YYYY-XXXX)
- requestId
- equipmentId
- providerId
- customerId
- sellerName
- buyerName
- subtotal
- vatRate = 0.15
- vatAmount
- totalAmount
- currency = SAR
- status: paid | pending | refunded
- createdAt
- paidAt
- paymentReference

==================================================
INVOICE TRIGGER
==================================================

- When payment is confirmed (paymentStatus = paid):
  → create invoice automatically

==================================================
FRONTEND CHANGES
==================================================

1. Update payment screen:
- Remove mock timeout logic
- Call /api/create-payment
- Redirect or simulate payment flow
- After success → call /api/verify-payment

2. Add invoices screen:
- Customer: sees own invoices
- Provider: sees received invoices

3. Link request → invoiceId

==================================================
SECURITY
==================================================

- Ensure:
  - No secret keys in React Native app
  - No secret keys in Firestore
  - Only Worker uses TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST

==================================================
FINAL
==================================================

1. Ensure app runs without crash
2. Ensure:
   - payment flow works (test mode)
   - invoice created after payment
   - invoice visible in UI

3. Commit:
"Phase 3.8 + 3.9: Tap test payment + invoices"

4. Push to GitHub

Return:
- Files changed
- API endpoints created
- How payment flow works now
- Confirmation no secrets exposed
